content.text: I found the likely source: `write_transforming::define_variable_members` creates per-element array reads using `Literal::integer(IntegerType::U8, i.to_string(), ...)`, so index 256 is synthesized as a `u8` literal and later const-eval panics. Next I’ll inspect the pass tests and compiler test harness so I can add a temporary repro.

39	- `[(PassStruct, input), ...]` – a list of passes to run sequentially. Each entry is a tuple of `(pass_struct, input)`.
40	- `input` – the argument to the pass. Can be `()` if none, or a struct literal like `(SsaFormingInput { rename_defs: true })`.

72	2. No other code needs to change — macros automatically generate:
73	   - The runner function
74	   - The test function (`#[test] fn new_pass_runner_test()`)

78	### 2. Create the test directories
79	
80	Each pass requires two directories in the Leo repository:

content.text:
Implemented the fix.

What changed:
- In `crates/passes/src/write_transforming/visitor.rs`, the write-transforming pass no longer synthesizes every generated array index literal as `u8`.
- For generated per-element array member definitions:
  - indices `0..=255` remain `u8`, preserving existing pass-test expectations/output for small arrays.
  - indices `>=256` are generated as `u32`, preventing SSA const propagation from trying to parse `256` as a `u8`.

Validation performed:
- Reproduced the original panic with a temporary project using:
  ```leo
  program test.aleo {
      fn foo(t: [u8; 257]) -> [u8; 257] {
          t[0u8] = 1u8;
          return t;
      }
  }
  ```
- Confirmed the panic was:
  `ParseIntError { kind: PosOverflow }`
- After the fix, rebuilt `leo-lang` and reran the repro successfully; `leo build` completed without panic.
- Ran targeted tests:
  - `cargo test -p leo-passes ssa_const_propagation_runner_test`
  - `cargo test -p leo-passes write_transforming_runner_test`

Cleanup:
- Removed the temporary repro project from `mnt_tmp`.

Note:
- Existing unrelated working tree changes remain untouched:
  - `crates/package/src/lib.rs`
  - untracked `reports/`
- My change is only in:
  - `crates/passes/src/write_transforming/visitor.rs`
